blog_title: Girls Hoodies Wholesale India — 60% College Merch Demand You're Missing in 2025
caption:
Someone ordered 300 boys hoodies for college fest. I asked, what about girls? He said no demand. That's ₹1.5 lakh left on the table 😬

Here's the reality: 60% college merch buyers are girls. But most suppliers only stock boys sizes. Girls need XS & S most — keep 40% small, 30% medium, 30% large. Repeat orders follow when you stock right.

Save this post if you're sourcing hoodies for your next bulk order 👇
